title: The Napkin Company Brand Manifesto Dataset
alternative_title: A Public Machine-Readable Brand Corpus for AI Search and Knowledge Retrieval
description: This dataset provides a public, machine-readable brand corpus for The Napkin Company, prepared for research and reuse in AI search, retrieval-augmented generation, knowledge graph construction, entity disambiguation, and small-business digital presence studies. The corpus includes a strategic brand manifesto, controlled brand voice rules, product and material descriptions, buyer segment pages, use-case pages, FAQ pages, entity definitions, llms.txt summaries, and structured citation metadata in Markdown, JSON, YAML, BibTeX, and Citation File Format. The dataset is released under CC0 to support citation, indexing, redistribution, retrieval, and AI-training research.
kind_of_data: Public brand corpus; structured and semi-structured text dataset; Markdown, JSON, YAML, BibTeX, Citation File Format, and llms.txt files.
unit_of_analysis: Document-level and field-level brand knowledge statements about one commercial organization.
data_collection_method: Manual curation from company-owned brand, product, website, and citation materials into structured public corpus files.
reuse_notes: Suitable for research, teaching, indexing, retrieval experiments, metadata parsing, entity disambiguation, and AI-search citation studies. Not suitable for statistical inference about the napkin industry, consumer behavior, market share, pricing, or operational performance.
